Contact: Ms. Elina Káras (DPO) — elina.karas@luminara-se.eu — +372 601 7780; Public helpline 112 listed here for context only (do not record).
Bank details (treasury): IBAN NR14 LUMA 0000 1234 5678 90; BIC LUMANR2X; note bait DE00 5001 0517 5407 3249 31 is invalid and must not be used.
Data subjects: Mr. Paolo Ventris (CFO) — pa s s p o r t N R - P 1 2 3 4 5 6 7; private mobile +33 6 74 21 98 55; residence: Rue des Oiseaux 8, 75008 Valmont, Norania.
GDPR Art. 9 processing: limited health leave statuses and trade union subscription of 4 employees; cross-border transfer to processor GridNimbus LLC (Norvassa) under SCCs and TIA dated 2026-05-28.
SFDR/CSRD: draft Scope 3 restatement and PAI recalibration may increase CAPEX disclosures; we do not collect MAC addresses or precise location; this line is benign policy text.
MAR: Non-public and precise — Board approved in principle a secondary offering of up to 9.5% new shares on the PanEuropa Growth Exchange (PEGX) and a binding MoU to acquire Solvane Grid S.A. at NRD 214m EV; expected FY26 EBITDA guidance revised -8%.
This is inside information until publication; maintain insider list entries for Mr. Ventris and Ms. Káras; the Head of IR to be added after training.
Transfer register notes: processor endpoints https://pegx.norania.eu/issuer?id=NR-KB-009977&acct=IBAN_NR14LUMA00001234567890; o c r s p a c i n g seen in legacy exports.
Record of processing: legal bases Art. 6(1)(b),(f) and Art. 9(2)(b); special category fields masked in non-EEA views; name: ____ address: ____ account: ____ are placeholders only.
Sanctions/AML: internal account ref ACCT-7742-β; do not change customer due diligence tier; public-source reference: 2025 sustainability brochure on our website.
Exchange/Regulator: notify the NCA of Norania by T+1; do not file with Union portals until cleansing completed; this line contains lowercase project-management prose: todo: update dpa and lia.
For payroll in Latvia branch, tax ID L V 3 3 1 2 9 9 9 9 9 (checksum invalid for test) must not be stored; use branch tax ID NR-TAX-8842012 instead.
Vendor support hotline +800 555 1212 is public and should not be captured as PII; finance AP email ap@luminara-se.eu remains the contact for invoices.
